_note: OPTIONAL FALLBACK. Recommended baseline gets github + context7 from the official plugins github@claude-plugins-official + context7@claude-plugins-official (enabledPlugins in .claude/settings.json). Use this .mcp.json only if you prefer the committed MCP-server path; then add 'github','context7' to enabledMcpjsonServers in .claude/settings.json. Do NOT enable both the plugin and this server for the same MCP.
